SEARCH
Module UniversitySystem
Package model.users

Class Student

java.lang.Object
model.users.User
model.users.Student
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<Student>, model.observer.Observer
public class Student extends model.users.User implements Comparable<Student>, Serializable
Represents a student in the university system. A student can register for courses, receive grades, join organizations, subscribe to journals, and participate in research activities. Inherits basic user functionality from User.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Sabina
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • Student

      public Student(int id, String login, String password, String firstName, String lastName, String studentId, String major, int year)
      Constructs a Student object.
      Parameters:
      id - system user id
      login - user login
      password - user password
      firstName - student's first name
      lastName - student's last name
      studentId - student identifier
      major - student's major
      year - year of study

  • Method Details

    • becomeResearcher

      public void becomeResearcher()
      Converts the student into a researcher by creating a research profile.

    • isResearcher

      public boolean isResearcher()
      Checks whether the student is a researcher.
      Returns:
      true if the student has a research profile

      public model.research.ResearchDecorator getResearchProfile()
      Returns the student's research profile.

    • registerCourse

      public void registerCourse(model.academic.Course c) throws model.exceptions.CreditLimitException
      Registers the student for a course.
      Parameters:
      c - course to register
      Throws:
      model.exceptions.CreditLimitException - if total credits exceed 21

    • addMark

      public void addMark(model.academic.Course course, model.academic.Mark mark) throws model.exceptions.FailLimitException
      Adds a mark for a course and updates GPA.
      Parameters:
      course - selected course
      mark - mark received for the course
      Throws:
      model.exceptions.FailLimitException - if student already failed 3 courses

    • viewMarks

      public Map<model.academic.Course,model.academic.Mark> viewMarks()
      Displays and returns all student marks.
      Returns:
      unmodifiable map of marks

      public void viewCourses()
      Displays all registered courses.
